name.full: AI-Powered Email Classification and Auto-Drafting Bot

description.short: Classifies incoming emails, drafts replies, and tracks response SLAs
description.full: Email Triage Agent monitors shared mailboxes via Graph subscriptions, classifies emails using OpenAI function calling (urgent, needs-reply, FYI, spam), auto-drafts replies for review, and feeds analytics into a Fabric pipeline for classification accuracy, response time SLAs, and topic trend analysis.

commands.title: stats
commands.description: Classification accuracy and response time metrics
